name: two-walls
description: Two Walls — stopping insider fraud in prepaid electricity tokens (UZH PoC)

scripts.setup: npm run setup:keys -w server && npm run setup:xrpl -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w dashboard
scripts.signers: concurrently -k -n utility,city-a,city-b -c cyan,magenta,blue "npm -w server run signer:utility" "npm -w server run signer:city-a" "npm -w server run signer:city-b"
scripts.backend: concurrently -k -n bank,utility,city-a,city-b,coord -c yellow,cyan,magenta,blue,green "npm -w server run bank" "npm -w server run signer:utility" "npm -w server run signer:city-a" "npm -w server run signer:city-b" "npm -w server run coordinator"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n bank,utility,city-a,city-b,coord,dash -c yellow,cyan,magenta,blue,green,white "npm -w server run bank" "npm -w server run signer:utility" "npm -w server run signer:city-a" "npm -w server run signer:city-b" "npm -w server run coordinator" "npm -w dashboard run dev"
